title: IID Normal Simulation
text:
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)


Attaching package: 'dplyr'


The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':

    filter, lag


The following objects are masked from 'package:base':

    intersect, setdiff, setequal, union

library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(knitr)

title: IID Normal Simulation
IID Normal Simulation
text:
P-value histograms

CvM p-values

normal_long |>
  filter(method == "CvM") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = pvalue)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, boundary = 0) +
  facet_grid(discretize ~ n) +
  labs(
    x = "p-value",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Histogram of CvM p-values: IID Normal simulation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()










AD p-values

normal_long |>
  filter(method == "AD") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = pvalue)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, boundary = 0) +
  facet_grid(discretize ~ n) +
  labs(
    x = "p-value",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Histogram of AD p-values: IID Normal simulation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

title: IID Normal Simulation
text:
Type-I error rate

type_one_table <- normal_long |>
  group_by(n, method, discretize) |>
  summarise(
    MC = n(),
    type_one_error = mean(pvalue < alpha, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


CvM type-I error rate

type_one_table |>
  filter(method == "CvM") |>
  arrange(discretize, n) |>
  kable(
    digits = 4,
    caption = "Estimated type-I error rates for CvM: IID Normal simulation"
  )


Estimated type-I error rates for CvM: IID Normal simulation

title: gofedf Simulation Studies
text:
This website summarizes Monte Carlo simulation studies for goodness-of-fit tests implemented in the gofedf package.
The current simulations include:

IID Normal simulations using testNormal()
IID Gamma simulations using testGamma()
Linear model normal-error simulations using testLMNormal()
Gamma GLM simulations using testGLMGamma()

For each simulation, we examine the distribution of p-values and estimate the empirical type-I error rate at the nominal level 0.05.



IID Normal simulation
IID Gamma simulation
Linear model normal-error simulation
Gamma GLM simulation




The simulations vary sample size and covariance approximation method. The sample sizes considered are:

c(25, 50, 100, 250)

[1]  25  50 100 250


For each setting, the goodness-of-fit tests are applied using both the Cramér-von Mises and Anderson-Darling statistics, with both discretized and non-discretized covariance approximations.

title: gofedf Simulation Studies
text:
IID Normal simulation
IID Gamma simulation
Linear model normal-error simulation
Gamma GLM simulation

title: gofedf Simulation Studies
text:
The simulations vary sample size and covariance approximation method. The sample sizes considered are:

c(25, 50, 100, 250)

[1]  25  50 100 250


For each setting, the goodness-of-fit tests are applied using both the Cramér-von Mises and Anderson-Darling statistics, with both discretized and non-discretized covariance approximations.

title: IID Gamma Simulation
text:
library(dplyr)


Attaching package: 'dplyr'


The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':

    filter, lag


The following objects are masked from 'package:base':

    intersect, setdiff, setequal, union

library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)

title: IID Gamma Simulation
IID Gamma Simulation
text:
Histogram of p-values

CvM p-values

gamma_long |>
  filter(method == "CvM") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = pvalue)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, boundary = 0) +
  facet_grid(shape + discretize ~ n) +
  labs(
    x = "p-value",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Histogram of CvM p-values: IID Gamma simulation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()










AD p-values

gamma_long |>
  filter(method == "AD") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = pvalue)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, boundary = 0) +
  facet_grid(shape + discretize ~ n) +
  labs(
    x = "p-value",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Histogram of AD p-values: IID Gamma simulation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

title: IID Gamma Simulation
text:
Type-I error rate

type_one_table <- gamma_long |>
  group_by(n, shape, scale, method, discretize) |>
  summarise(
    MC = n(),
    type_one_error = mean(pvalue < alpha, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


CvM type-I error rate

type_one_table |>
  filter(method == "CvM") |>
  arrange(shape, discretize, n) |>
  kable(
    digits = 4,
    caption = "Estimated type-I error rates for CvM: IID Gamma simulation"
  )

title: Gamma GLM Simulation
text:
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)


Attaching package: 'dplyr'


The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':

    filter, lag


The following objects are masked from 'package:base':

    intersect, setdiff, setequal, union

library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(knitr)

title: Gamma GLM Simulation
Gamma GLM Simulation
text:
P-value histograms

CvM p-values

glm_gamma_long |>
  filter(method == "CvM", is.finite(pvalue)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = pvalue)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, boundary = 0) +
  facet_grid(k + discretize ~ n) +
  labs(
    x = "p-value",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Histogram of CvM p-values: Gamma GLM simulation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()










AD p-values

glm_gamma_long |>
  filter(method == "AD", is.finite(pvalue)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = pvalue)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, boundary = 0) +
  facet_grid(k + discretize ~ n) +
  labs(
    x = "p-value",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Histogram of AD p-values: Gamma GLM simulation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
